samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Controls the traffic light system with three colors (Red, Yellow, Green) and a pedestrian crossing button.</description>
    
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian crossing request signal.</input>
        <output id="clock" width_description="[7:0]">Output representing the current count value.</output>
        <output id="red">Output indicating whether the red light is active.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Output indicating whether the yellow light is active.</output>
        <output id="green">Output indicating whether the green light is active.</output>
    </ports>
    
    <parameter_description>
        <param_value id="idle" type="integer">0</param_value>
        <param_value id="s1_red" type="integer">1</param_value>
        <param_value id="s2_yellow" type="integer">2</param_value>
        <param_value id="s3_green" type="integer">3</param_value>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        
        reg [7:0] cnt;
        reg [1:0] state;
        reg p_red;
        reg p_yellow;
        reg p_green;
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                state <= idle;
                p_red <= 1'd0;
                p_yellow <= 1'd0;
                p_green <= 1'd0;
            end else begin
                case(state)
                    idle:begin
                        state <= s1_red;
                        p_red <= 1'd0;
                        p_yellow <= 1'd0;
                        p_green <= 1'd0;
                    end
                    
                    s1_red:begin
                        p_red <= 1'd1;
                        if(cnt == 3'd0)begin
                            state <= s3_green;
                        end else begin
                            state <= s1_red;
                        end
                    end
                    
                    s2_yellow:begin
                        p_yellow <= 1'd1;
                        if(cnt == 3'd0)begin
                            state <= s1_red;
                        end else begin
                            state <= s2_yellow;
                        end
                    end
                    
                    s3_green:begin
                        p_green <= 1'd1;
                        if(cnt == 3'd0)begin
                            state <= s2_yellow;
                        end else begin
                            state <= s3_green;
                        end
                    end
                endcase
            end
        end
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n)begin
                cnt <= 8'd10;
            end else if(pass_request && green)begin
                if((cnt - 8'd10) > 8'd9)begin
                    cnt <= 8'd10;
                end else begin
                    cnt <= cnt;
                end
            end else if(!green && p_green)begin
                cnt <= 8'd60;
            end else if(!yellow && p_yellow)begin
                cnt <= 8'd5;
            end else if(!red && p_red)begin
                cnt <= 8'd10;
            end else begin
                cnt <= cnt - 8'd1;
            end
        end
        
        
        assign clock = cnt;
        
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n)begin
                red <= 1'd0;
                yellow <= 1'd0;
                green <= 1'd0;
            end else begin
                red <= p_red;
                yellow <= p_yellow;
                green <= p_green;
            end
        end
        
        
    </implementation>
</module>
